testcase.name: test_client_trainings_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should be a list of enrollments assert False + where False = isinstance({'enrollments': [{'completed_at': '2026-01-23T12:04:46.099201+00:00', 'downloadable_files': [], 'end_date': '2026-02-16', 'enrolled_at': '2026-01-23T11:35:55.379436+00:00', ...}, {'downloadable_files': [{'name': 'Guide PDF', 'type': 'application/pdf', 'url': '/uploads/guide.pdf'}, {'name': 'Video Introduction', 'type': 'video/mp4', 'url': '/uploads/intro.mp4'}], 'end_date': None, 'enrolled_at': '2026-01-23T11:35:04.765944+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}, {'downloadable_files': [], 'end_date': '2026-02-16', 'enrolled_at': '2026-01-23T11:31:29.545334+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}, {'downloadable_files': [], 'end_date': '2026-02-16', 'enrolled_at': '2026-01-23T11:29:46.721494+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}], 'stats': {'completed': 1, 'in_progress': 3, 'total': 4}}, list)

testcase.name: test_review_workflow_for_completed_training
